_comment: Opt-in allowlist for redistributing model files on the gated R2 mirror. A model is mirrored only when its name appears in 'models' (controlnet annotators are first-class records named annotator_<control type>). Hosting a weight here is redistribution. This list is prepopulated with the current hostable set, every member of which was selected on the basis of being open-source / redistribution-friendly; newly added models are NOT mirrored until their name is added here and their upstream license confirmed. Each entry is either a bare name string, or an object {"name": ..., "license": ..., "note": ...}; a provided license/note is stamped onto the uploaded object for the audit trail.
